title: IdentityBundle
description:
An identity bundle for stateless verification in CI/CD environments.

Contains all the information needed to verify commit signatures without requiring access to the identity repository or daemon.

attestation_chain.description: Chain of attestations linking the signing key to the identity

bundle_timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when this bundle was created

max_valid_for_secs.description: Maximum age in seconds before this bundle is considered stale

public_key_hex.description: The public key in hex format for signature verification

Attestation.description: Represents a 2-way key attestation between a primary identity and a device key.

delegated_by.description: DID of the attestation that delegated authority (for chain tracking).

device_public_key.description: Ed25519 public key of the device (32 bytes, hex-encoded in JSON).

device_signature.description: Device's Ed25519 signature over the canonical attestation data (hex-encoded in JSON).

environment_claim.description: Unsigned environment claim for gateway-level verification via `auths-env`. Excluded from `CanonicalAttestationData` — does not affect signatures.

identity_signature.description: Issuer's Ed25519 signature over the canonical attestation data (hex-encoded in JSON).

revoked_at.description: Timestamp when the attestation was revoked, if applicable.

rid.description: Record identifier linking this attestation to its storage ref.

signer_type.description: The type of entity that produced this signature (human, agent, workload). Included in the canonical JSON before signing — the signature covers this field.

subject.description: DID of the device being attested.

DeviceDID.description: Wrapper around a device DID string that ensures Git-safe ref formatting.

Role.description:
Role classification for organization members.

Governs the default capability set assigned at member authorization time. Serializes as lowercase strings: `"admin"`, `"member"`, `"readonly"`.

oneOf.description: Full admin access with all capabilities.

SignerType.description:
The type of entity that produced a signature.

Duplicated here (also in `auths-policy`) because `auths-verifier` is a standalone minimal-dependency crate that cannot depend on `auths-policy`.

oneOf.description: A CI/CD workload or service identity.
